{{CargoRelic
|name=Codex Draconis
|class_id=22779
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The living legacy of dragonkind - binding their origin myths, elemental mastery, and ancient pacts. Only a worthy heir may unlock its veiled wisdom.
|fame=108
|art=68
|fth=50
|civ=64
|tech=72
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +6%<br>Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +3
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +8%<br>Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +6
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +10%<br>Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +9
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +14%<br>Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +15
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +18%<br>Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +21
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +24%<br>Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +30
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +24%<br>Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +30<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail HP +6000
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's FAME +15
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x B-tad Drops +6%
}}
